title: Amy's Soda Mod
description: This is a very simple mod that adds a variety of soda to the game, ranging from Pepsi to Nuka-Cola.
body:
This is a very simple mod that adds a variety of soda to the game, ranging from Pepsi to Nuka-Cola, incase you want to add a little flavor to your Minecraft experience.

Features:
- 52 Different Sodas
- Sodas give varying Effects

**_DISCLAIMER_**

I made this mod using MCreator for fun because I was bored one day, and have slowly been updating it since.
